title: Portamod Mod
description: adds more deco / building blocks for Portalmod
body:
This mod adds more intricate deco and building blocks to mesh with Portalmod, including more lunecast and blackplate varients, signage, simple redstone panels, and more.
Great for precise map remakes or just adding detail.

Requires Portalmod if you want it to be useful.
Also, join the portalmod discord, (in the creations forum) to see sneak peeks if im working on something new!

https://discord.com/channels/704266427577663548/1496257379501867241
original portalmod textures by PhantomEye and Larsmans
[https://portalmod.net/](https://portalmod.net/)
